# hiveden.dev

> Build in public, ship in code.

## About

hiveden.dev is a technical project documentation site by hiveden (GitHub: https://github.com/hiveden). Based in Shanghai. Focused on AI Agent engineering, automation, and open source tooling.

## Projects

### tts-agent-harness
- Repo: https://github.com/hiveden/tts-agent-harness
- Description: Multi-agent TTS production harness. Three-stage pipeline: Fish TTS for synthesis, WhisperX for quality validation, Claude for auto-fix. 87% of chunks pass automatically; failures enter a repair loop that converges within 3 rounds.
- Tech: Node.js, Fish TTS, WhisperX, Claude
- Docs: https://hiveden.dev/projects/tts-agent-harness

### harness-demo
- Repo: https://github.com/hiveden/harness-demo
- Description: Harness Engineering Demo — experience AI Agent self-improving loop in 5 minutes.
- Tech: Shell

## Links

- Website: https://hiveden.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/hiveden
- Bilibili: https://space.bilibili.com/386785020

## Contact

For collaboration or questions, open an issue on the relevant GitHub repository.
